function migrateEntity(entity, fromRegion, toRegion, handler) {
  fromRegion.removeEntity(entity);
  toRegion.addEntity(entity);
  if (handler) {
    handler({
      entity,
      fromRegion,
      toRegion
    });
  }
}
function migrateEntities(migrations, handler) {
  for (const migration of migrations) {
    migrateEntity(
      migration.entity,
      migration.fromRegion,
      migration.toRegion,
      handler
    );
  }
}
export {
  migrateEntities,
  migrateEntity
};
//# sourceMappingURL=index27.js.map
